title: COLLEGE AND CAREER SERVICES - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER COLLEGE AND CAREER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides career exploration, school search and exploration, resources for standardized test preparation, admissions and scholarship assistance, and educational workshops. Virtual service only. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: -Scholarships must be a current or former NAYA participants and pursuing a post-secondary degree -All other services:Grades 9-12 and who self-identify as Native American Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 325-4803 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 325-4803 College and Career Readiness Manager Auna Castellon Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 75 Services: Career Counseling * Native American Community College/University Entrance Support * Native American Community Student Financial Aid * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - MICRO ENTERPRISE EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MANY NATIONS ACADEMY EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EDUCATIONAL YOUTH ADVOCACY AND ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH EQUITY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS YOUTH SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - NAYA GENERATIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FOSTER CARE SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE INDIAN PARENTING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS AND SEASONAL PROGRAMMING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CULTURAL ARTS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RECREATION MUTUAL SUPPORT - HEALING CIRCLE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CHXI SAN PLAYGROUP UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
